ranked_matches.title: CSK Old vs CSK New (Exhibition Match - Concluded)

summary: The main cricket focus today is the 4th T20 between New Zealand and South Africa. The CSK Roar 2026 exhibition match has concluded, with CSK Old winning. No matches are currently scheduled for the Sheffield Shield 2024-25 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, as those tournaments have concluded.
